 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-6xs","title":"Configure Vercel deployment (vercel.json)","description":"**Details:**
- vercel.json in repository root
- Configure build settings for monorepo
- Set output directory for Next.js app
- Configure rewrites/redirects if needed
- Environment variables setup

**vercel.json:**
```json
{
  "buildCommand": "cd apps/web && bun run build",
  "outputDirectory": "apps/web/.next",
  "installCommand": "bun install",
  "framework": "nextjs",
  "rewrites": [
    { "source": "/registry.json", "destination": "/api/registry" }
  ]
}
```

**Environment Variables:**
- NEXT_PUBLIC_GIT_SHA (set automatically by Vercel)
- JFP_REGISTRY_VERSION (build-time)
- NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL

**Custom Domain:** jeffreysprompts.com

**Reasoning:** Vercel deployment config ensures correct monorepo handling. Environment variables enable version tracking and analytics.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:33:26.020138672-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:33:26.020138672-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-6xs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r9m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:20.773175581-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-7g3","title":"Implement jfp help command (full documentation)","description":"**Details:**
- `jfp help` shows comprehensive documentation
- Organized by category: Listing, Viewing, Copying, Installing, Registry, etc.
- Examples for common workflows
- Links to online documentation
- Pager support for long output

**Output Structure:**
```
USAGE
  jfp <command> [options]

COMMANDS

  Listing & Searching
    list                    List all prompts
    search <query>          Search prompts by query
    suggest <task>          Suggest prompts for a task

  Viewing
    show <id>               Show prompt details
    categories              List all categories
    tags                    List all tags with counts

  Copying & Exporting
    copy <id>               Copy prompt to clipboard
    render <id>             Render prompt with variables
    export <id>             Export as SKILL.md or markdown

  Installing Skills
    install <id>...         Install prompts as skills
    uninstall <id>...       Remove installed skills
    installed               List installed skills
    update                  Update installed skills

  Bundles
    bundles                 List available bundles
    bundle show <id>        Show bundle details

  Registry
    registry status         Show cache status
    registry refresh        Force cache refresh

  Utilities
    open <id>               Open prompt in browser
    doctor                  Check environment
    about                   About this tool
    completion              Generate shell completions

EXAMPLES
  jfp list --category ideation --json
  jfp search 'readme' --limit 5
  jfp install idea-wizard readme-reviser
  jfp render my-prompt --VAR=value

DOCUMENTATION
  https://jeffreysprompts.com/docs
```

**Reasoning:** Comprehensive help is essential for CLI discoverability.  {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-blt","title":"Build CopyButton component with clipboard API","description":"**Details:**
- Reusable copy-to-clipboard button
- Uses navigator.clipboard.writeText
- Visual feedback: icon change + optional toast
- Supports multiple variants (primary, ghost, badge)
- Optional haptic feedback on mobile

**Implementation based on brennerbot:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/components/ui/copy-button.tsx
'use client';

interface CopyButtonProps {
  text: string;
  variant?: 'default' | 'ghost' | 'badge';
  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';
  label?: string;
  onCopied?: () => void;
}

export function CopyButton({ text, variant = 'default', size = 'md', label, onCopied }: CopyButtonProps) {
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
  
  const handleCopy = async () => {
    try {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
      setCopied(true);
      
      // Haptic feedback on mobile
      if ('vibrate' in navigator) {
        navigator.vibrate(10);
      }
      
      onCopied?.();
      
      setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to copy:', error);
    }
  };
  
  return (
    <Button variant={variant} size={size} onClick={handleCopy}>
      {copied ? <Check className='size-4' /> : <Copy className='size-4' />}
      {label && <span>{copied ? 'Copied!' : label}</span>}
    </Button>
  );
}
```

**Variants:**
- default: Primary button style
- ghost: No background, icon only
- badge: Small inline badge style

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-c8l","title":"Implement tokenizer (search/tokenize.ts)","description":"**Details:**
- `tokenize(text)` splits text into searchable tokens
- Lowercase normalization
- Punctuation removal (preserve hyphens in compound words)
- Stopword filtering (the, a, an, is, are, etc.)
- Optional stemming (simple suffix stripping)
- Unicode normalization (NFD→NFC)

**Implementation:**
```typescript
export function tokenize(text: string): string[] {
  return text
    .toLowerCase()
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, ' ')
    .split(/\s+/)
    .filter(token => token.length > 1 && !STOPWORDS.has(token));
}
```

**Stopwords:** Common English stopwords (50-100 words)

**Used By:** BM25 search, synonym expansion

**Reasoning:** Consistent tokenization is foundational for search quality. Must be fast (run on every keystroke in SpotlightSearch) and deterministic.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:51.034344375-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:07.171689686-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:07.171689686-05:00","close_reason":"Core package fully implemented with types, registry, bundles, workflows, schema, search (tokenize, synonyms, BM25, engine), export (skills, markdown, json), and template (render, variables)"}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-dv1","title":"Create validate-prompts.ts CI validation script","description":"**Details:**
- Standalone validation script for CI
- Validates all prompts against Zod schema
- Checks for duplicate IDs
- Validates ID format (lowercase kebab-case)
- Validates category and tag consistency
- Clear error reporting

**Validation Rules:**
1. **Schema Compliance:** All required fields present, correct types
2. **ID Uniqueness:** No duplicate prompt IDs
3. **ID Format:** Lowercase kebab-case only (^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$)
4. **Category Validity:** Must be from allowed categories
5. **Date Format:** ISO 8601 for updatedAt, createdAt
6. **Content Non-Empty:** Prompt content must have substance
7. **Version Format:** Semver (x.y.z)

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// scripts/validate-prompts.ts
import { prompts } from '@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts';
import { promptSchema } from '@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts/schema';

function validate() {
  const errors: string[] = [];
  const ids = new Set<string>();
  
  for (const prompt of prompts) {
    // Schema validation
    const result = promptSchema.safeParse(prompt);
    if (!result.success) {
      errors.push(`[${prompt.id}] Schema error: ${result.error.message}`);
    }
    
    // Duplicate ID check
    if (ids.has(prompt.id)) {
      errors.push(`[${prompt.id}] Duplicate ID detected`);
    }
    ids.add(prompt.id);
    
    // ID format check
    if (!/^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$/.test(prompt.id)) {
      errors.push(`[${prompt.id}] Invalid ID format (must be lowercase kebab-case)`);
    }
    
    // Content check
    if (!prompt.content?.trim()) {
      errors.push(`[${prompt.id}] Empty content`);
    }
  }
  
  if (errors.length) {
    console.error('❌ Validation failed:');
    errors.forEach(e => console.error(`  - ${e}`));
    process.exit(1);
  }
  
  console.log(`✓ Validated ${prompts.length} prompts successfully`);
}

validate();
```

**Run:** `bun run scripts/validate-prompts.ts`

**CI Integration:** Runs on every PR before build

**Location:** scripts/validate-prompts.ts

**Reasoning:** Prompt validation catches errors before they reach production. ID uniqueness and format rules ensure stable references. CI integration prevents bad data from being merged.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:35:25.051256701-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:35:25.051256701-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-dv1","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-oc2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:58.071509452-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-n3p","title":"Create build-data.ts script for data pipeline","description":"**Details:**
- Main build script that generates all static data files
- Validates prompts against schema
- Generates registry.json and registry.manifest.json
- Computes checksums for cache validation
- Reports errors with clear messages

**Script Responsibilities:**
1. Import prompts from packages/core
2. Validate all prompts against Zod schema
3. Generate registry.json with full payload
4. Generate registry.manifest.json with checksums
5. Write files to apps/web/public/
6. Output summary statistics

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// scripts/build-data.ts
import { prompts, bundles, workflows } from '@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts';
import { promptSchema } from '@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts/schema';
import { createHash } from 'crypto';

async function main() {
  console.log('Building data assets...');
  
  // Validate prompts
  const errors: string[] = [];
  for (const prompt of prompts) {
    const result = promptSchema.safeParse(prompt);
    if (!result.success) {
      errors.push(`${prompt.id}: ${result.error.message}`);
    }
  }
  
  if (errors.length) {
    console.error('Validation errors:', errors);
    process.exit(1);
  }
  
  // Build registry payload
  const registry = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    version: process.env.JFP_REGISTRY_VERSION ?? '0.0.0',
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    prompts,
    bundles,
    workflows,
    meta: {
      totalPromptCount: prompts.length,
      categories: [...new Set(prompts.map(p => p.category))],
      tags: [...new Set(prompts.flatMap(p => p.tags))].sort()
    }
  };
  
  // Compute checksums
  const registryJson = JSON.stringify(registry);
  const registryHash = createHash('sha256').update(registryJson).digest('hex');
  
  const manifest = {
    version: registry.version,
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    checksums: {
      registry: `sha256:${registryHash}`,
      prompts: Object.fromEntries(
        prompts.map(p => [p.id, `sha256:${createHash('sha256').update(p.content).digest('hex')}`])
      )
    }
  };
  
  // Write files
  await Bun.write('apps/web/public/registry.json', registryJson);
  await Bun.write('apps/web/public/registry.manifest.json', JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2));
  
  console.log(`✓ Generated registry.json (${prompts.length} prompts)`);
  console.log(`✓ Generated registry.manifest.json`);
}

main();
```

**Run in CI:**
- Part of build step before Next.js build
- Fails CI if validation errors

**Reasoning:** Centralized data pipeline ensures registry consistency.  {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rnm","title":"Implement useLocalStorage hook","description":"**Details:**
- Generic hook for localStorage persistence
- SSR-safe (handles hydration)
- Type-safe with generics
- Used by: basket, theme, variable inputs, preferences

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts
'use client';

export function useLocalStorage<T>(key: string, initialValue: T) {
  // State to store our value
  const [storedValue, setStoredValue] = useState<T>(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return initialValue;
    try {
      const item = localStorage.getItem(key);
      return item ? JSON.parse(item) : initialValue;
    } catch {
      return initialValue;
    }
  });

  // Persist to localStorage on change
  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return;
    try {
      localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(storedValue));
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to save to localStorage:', error);
    }
  }, [key, storedValue]);

  return [storedValue, setStoredValue] as const;
}
```

**SSR Handling:**
- Initial render uses provided default
- useEffect syncs with localStorage after hydration
- Prevents hydration mismatch errors

**Location:** apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts

**Reasoning:** Many features need persistent state (basket, theme, variable inputs). Centralizing localStorage logic in a hook ensures consistent behavior and SSR safety.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:35.714509321-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:35.714509321-05:00"}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-tco","title":"Set up CLI configuration system (lib/config.ts)","description":"**Details:**
- Configuration file at $HOME/.config/jfp/config.json
- Supports: registry URL, cache settings, skills directories, preferences

**Config Schema:**
```typescript
interface JfpConfig {
  registry: {
    url: string;           // default: https://jeffreysprompts.com
    cacheTtl: number;      // default: 3600 (1 hour)
    autoRefresh: boolean;  // default: true
  };
  skills: {
    personalDir: string;   // default: $HOME/.config/claude/skills
    projectDir: string;    // default: .claude/skills
    preferProject: boolean; // default: false
  };
  output: {
    color: boolean;        // default: true (TTY detection)
    json: boolean;         // default: false
  };
  updates: {
    autoCheck: boolean;    // default: true
    autoUpdate: boolean;   // default: false (opt-in)
  };
}
```

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// packages/cli/src/lib/config.ts

const CONFIG_PATH = join(homedir(), '.config', 'jfp', 'config.json');

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: JfpConfig = {
  registry: {
    url: 'https://jeffreysprompts.com',
    cacheTtl: 3600,
    autoRefresh: true,
  },
  skills: {
    personalDir: join(homedir(), '.config', 'claude', 'skills'),
    projectDir: '.claude/skills',
    preferProject: false,
  },
  output: {
    color: true,
    json: false,
  },
  updates: {
    autoCheck: true,
    autoUpdate: false,
  },
};

export function loadConfig(): JfpConfig {
  try {
    const raw = readFileSync(CONFIG_PATH, 'utf-8');
    return { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...JSON.parse(raw) };
  } catch {
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

export function saveConfig(config: Partial<JfpConfig>): void {
  const current = loadConfig();
  const merged = { ...current, ...config };
  mkdirSync(dirname(CONFIG_PATH), { recursive: true });
  writeFileSync(CONFIG_PATH, JSON.stringify(merged, null, 2));
}
```

**Environment Overrides:**
- JFP_REGISTRY_URL
- JFP_CACHE_TTL
- JFP_NO_COLOR

**Reasoning:** Configuration system enables customization without modifying code.  {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-u36","title":"Implement BasketContext and useBasket hook","description":"**Details:**
- React context for managing prompt basket state
- useBasket hook for components to interact with basket
- Persists to localStorage
- Used by PromptCard (add/remove) and BasketSidebar (list/export)

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/contexts/basket-context.tsx
'use client';

interface BasketContextValue {
  items: string[]; // prompt IDs
  addItem: (id: string) => void;
  removeItem: (id: string) => void;
  clearBasket: () => void;
  isInBasket: (id: string) => boolean;
}

export const BasketContext = createContext<BasketContextValue | null>(null);

export function BasketProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [items, setItems] = useLocalStorage<string[]>('jfp-basket', []);
  
  const addItem = (id: string) => {
    setItems(prev => prev.includes(id) ? prev : [...prev, id]);
  };
  
  const removeItem = (id: string) => {
    setItems(prev => prev.filter(i => i !== id));
  };
  
  const clearBasket = () => setItems([]);
  
  const isInBasket = (id: string) => items.includes(id);
  
  return (
    <BasketContext.Provider value={{ items, addItem, removeItem, clearBasket, isInBasket }}>
      {children}
    </BasketContext.Provider>
  );
}

// apps/web/src/hooks/use-basket.ts
export function useBasket() {
  const context = useContext(BasketContext);
  if (!context) throw new Error('useBasket must be used within BasketProvider');
  return context;
}
```

- apps/web/src/hooks/use-basket.ts
